fivem_license.desc: Required to start the service. Get your key at https://keymaster.fivem.net/

fivem_version.desc: Use 'recommended', 'latest', or a specific build like 6013-d8ae399d15680da569022f57ab7f2474d307c821. Invalid values fall back to recommended.

port.desc: TCP/UDP port the server will bind to.

server_hostname.desc: The name that shows up in the server browser (sv_hostname).

steam_webapikey.desc: Use your Steam WebApiKey or leave as 'none'. Get a key at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey/

txadmin_enable.desc: When enabled, the server boots into txAdmin's setup/monitor mode instead of directly executing server.cfg.

txadmin_port.desc: TCP port for the txAdmin web panel.

commands: apt-get -y install tar xz-utils curl git

install.text:
#!/bin/sh
set -e

extract_json_field() {
  echo "$1" | grep -o "\"$2\":\"[^\"]*\"" | sed "s/\"$2\":\"//;s/\"$//"
}

echo updating citizenfx resource files
rm -rf /tmp/cfx-server-data
git clone https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data.git /tmp/cfx-server-data
cp -Rf /tmp/cfx-server-data/resources/* resources/
rm -rf /tmp/cfx-server-data

RELEASE_PAGE=$(curl -sSL https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/)
CHANGELOGS_PAGE=$(curl -sSL https://changelogs-live.fivem.net/api/changelog/versions/linux/server)
FIVEM_VERSION=${fivem_version}

if [ "$FIVEM_VERSION" = recommended ] || [ -z "$FIVEM_VERSION" ]; then
  DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(extract_json_field "$CHANGELOGS_PAGE" recommended_download)
elif [ "$FIVEM_VERSION" = latest ]; then
  DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(extract_json_field "$CHANGELOGS_PAGE" latest_download)
else
  VERSION_PATH=$(echo "$RELEASE_PAGE" | grep -Eo '".*tar.xz"' | tr -d '"' | sed 's#^\./##' | grep -i "$FIVEM_VERSION" | head -n1)
  if [ -z "$VERSION_PATH" ]; then
    echo defaulting to recommended, requested version not found
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(extract_json_field "$CHANGELOGS_PAGE" recommended_download)
  else
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/$VERSION_PATH
  fi
fi

echo Downloading: $DOWNLOAD_LINK
curl -sSL "$DOWNLOAD_LINK" -o fx.tar.xz

echo Extracting fivem files
tar xf fx.tar.xz
rm -f fx.tar.xz run.sh

if [ -e server.cfg ]; then
  echo Skipping default server.cfg, already exists
else
  echo Downloading default fivem config
  curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/parkervcp/eggs/master/game_eggs/gta/fivem/server.cfg -o server.cfg
fi

mkdir -p logs/
echo install complete

commands: sh -c 'cd fivem && sh install.sh && rm -f install.sh'

install.text:
#!/bin/sh
set -e
cd "$(dirname "$0")"

sed -i "s/^endpoint_add_tcp.*/endpoint_add_tcp \"0.0.0.0:${port}\"/" server.cfg || echo "endpoint_add_tcp \"0.0.0.0:${port}\"" >> server.cfg
sed -i "s/^endpoint_add_udp.*/endpoint_add_udp \"0.0.0.0:${port}\"/" server.cfg || echo "endpoint_add_udp \"0.0.0.0:${port}\"" >> server.cfg
sed -i "s/^sv_hostname.*/sv_hostname \"${server_hostname}\"/" server.cfg || echo "sv_hostname \"${server_hostname}\"" >> server.cfg
sed -i "s/^sv_maxclients.*/sv_maxclients ${max_players}/" server.cfg || echo "sv_maxclients ${max_players}" >> server.cfg
sed -i "s/^set sv_licenseKey.*/set sv_licenseKey ${fivem_license}/" server.cfg || echo "set sv_licenseKey ${fivem_license}" >> server.cfg
sed -i "s/^set steam_webApiKey.*/set steam_webApiKey ${steam_webapikey}/" server.cfg || echo "set steam_webApiKey ${steam_webapikey}" >> server.cfg

export HOME="$(pwd)"

EXEC_ARG="+exec server.cfg"
if [ "${txadmin_enable}" = true ]; then
  EXEC_ARG=""
fi

# This mirrors the proven working Pterodactyl egg startup line exactly:
# FEXInterpreter wraps the bundled musl loader directly, which in turn
# loads FXServer with the correct library search path. This avoids
# relying on binfmt_misc auto-routing (which can be hijacked by a
# conflicting QEMU handler also present on this image) since FEX is
# invoked explicitly here, not via kernel exec interception.
exec FEXInterpreter ./alpine/opt/cfx-server/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1 \
  --library-path "./alpine/usr/lib/v8/:./alpine/lib/:./alpine/usr/lib/" \
  -- ./alpine/opt/cfx-server/FXServer \
  +set citizen_dir "$(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/citizen/" \
  +set sv_licenseKey ${fivem_license} \
  +set steam_webApiKey ${steam_webapikey} \
  +set sv_maxplayers ${max_players} \
  +set serverProfile default \
  +set txAdminPort ${txadmin_port} \
  $EXEC_ARG

run.command: sh -c 'cd fivem && chmod +x start.sh && sh start.sh'
